## bluefin-cli motd toggle

Toggle MOTD for shells

### Synopsis

Enable or disable MOTD display on shell startup for bash, zsh, fish, or all shells.

```
bluefin-cli motd toggle [shell|all] [on|off] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for toggle
```
